title: Introduction
subtitle: Abakada
description: Learn how Tagalog sounds and discover words you already know.

title: Hello
subtitle: Magalang
description: Master po, opo, and the respect system that's at the heart of every Filipino conversation.

title: Modern Tagalog
subtitle: Taglish
description: Discover how Filipinos actually speak — mixing Tagalog and English in everyday life.

title: Food
subtitle: Kain!
description: Learn essential food words and how to talk about eating — the most important activity in Filipino culture.

title: Family
subtitle: Pamilya
description: Meet the Filipino family tree and learn the titles that define every relationship.

title: Counting & Money
subtitle: Bilang
description: Count in Tagalog, handle everyday prices, and navigate the market like a local.

title: Daily Routines
subtitle: Araw-araw
description: Talk about your day from morning to night using common verbs and time expressions.

title: Feelings
subtitle: Damdamin
description: Express how you feel and describe the world around you with adjectives and ma- words.

title: Travel
subtitle: Lugar
description: Navigate directions, ask where things are, and talk about the places you visit.

title: Plans
subtitle: Oras
description: Tell time, make plans, and understand the Filipino sense of scheduling.

title: Affixes
subtitle: Salita
description: Unlock the affix system — the engine that builds thousands of Tagalog words from simple roots.
